hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; f="${f#"$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/"}"; case "$f" in *.py) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in docs/*|external/*|examples/*) exit 0;; nemo/collections/speechlm2/*) ;; nemo/collections/*) exit 0;; esac; black --quiet "$f"; isort --quiet "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
